title: Device Home Screen - Zoom out the application to verify that it remains the same
scenario: App home screen and Device Settings screen display correctly in app switcher preview and restore properly when returning to full screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected device on the Home screen.
3. Tap the Poly Studio Mobile app preview to return to full screen.
4. On the Home screen, tap the "..." button to open Device Settings.
6. Tap the Poly Studio Mobile app preview to return to full screen.
expected: The app preview in the app switcher shows the correct screen (Home screen in step 2, Device Settings screen in step 5). After returning to full screen, the app remains on the same screen as before switching (Home screen after step 3, Device Settings screen after step 6).
